name: Sleepover with Kela - Mom Included??
description:
Artist: Inu-sama

Scenario Summary: you and your girlfriend Kela are cuddling while she's on the phone with mommy bear Rhoda. Hearing the word 'sleepover' made Rhoda pause for a second. Before saying bye to Kela. Couple minutes later Kela decides to turn this sleepover up a notch before the room is bursted through by a milf
creator: Reed2Greedy
